conclusion: A current c8 first-nine profiler recapture reproduced row3/token118 red ([137,137,137,118,137,137,137,137]), so the first-nine c8 default was demoted back to all-layer rowchunk2. The all-layer profiler control stayed [137]*8 and produced a captured profiler summary with expected native batch attention/KV, c-aware projection, grouped-MoE, and batched sampler kernels. Post-change c8 all-layer attachment loaded c1, c8 serial bridge, primitive c8 correctness, and that profiler while preserving [137]*8; scaling refs are complete (aggregate_vs_c1=1.2751, aggregate_vs_serial_bridge=1.5311). The post-change c2/c4/c8 matrix is green. This is correctness/runtime evidence only; c8 remains non-retained because all-layer rowchunk keeps native_caware_decode=false.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: a focused c8 full-attention profiler blocker was eliminated by rejecting the red first-nine scope and demoting the default to all-layer rowchunk, with green profiler, baseline, primitive, c2/c4/c8 equality, and GPU1/XTX provenance. No retained throughput/scaling claim.
